emails.subject: Re: LM6000 Change Orders
emails.body: Re: LM6000 Change Orders Chris, I would think that we would want to designate which units are affected by the provisions of the change orders, to the extent a the change is specific to certain units. What do you think about that approach? Kay From: Chris Booth 08/30/2000 11:32 AM
